scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:app
scripts.test:app: npm run test:app:core && npm run test:app:evolution && npm run test:app:ingestion && npm run test:app:benchmark && npm run test:app:operations && npm run test:app:workspace
scripts.test:app:core: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "persists a full learning loop|auto-scores|retrieves similar|ingests historical reviewed|captures calibration|compares model|runs a historical replay|ingests labeled|routes draft|ingests macro|ingests earnings|ingests policy|promotes strong|seeds a first|refreshes benchmark trust|reports historical library coverage|ingests energy|ingests credit"
scripts.test:app:evolution: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "builds replay diagnostics|reuses successful|runs a governed molt|builds model lineage|runs an evolution cycle|persists evolution schedule config|builds family evolution|persists growth-pressure|runs growth-pressure|evaluates replay promotion|runs an automatic promotion|builds family-level|ranks replay tuning"
scripts.test:app:ingestion: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "pulls RSS|pulls transcript|queues feed|runs live transcript|ingests provider webhooks|persists reviewed memory|persists evolution schedules across pglite"
scripts.test:app:benchmark: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "composes and replays|captures benchmark history|runs walk-forward replay|stores walk-forward|blocks walk-forward|biases shell-growth|captures walk-forward snapshot|runs scheduled evolution"
scripts.test:app:operations: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "records durable operation|reports dependency readiness|queues long-running|queues scheduled evolution|surfaces queue pressure|reports worker supervision|reports worker service supervision|reports worker service runtime|reports worker runtime|reports external integration|actively probes|reports integration trends|exposes consolidated|blocks overlapping"
scripts.test:app:workspace: vitest run src/app.test.ts --pool=threads --testNamePattern "bootstraps auth|supports shared assignment|creates decision briefs|creates portfolio candidates|creates portfolio review sessions|allows studio draft deletion|supports hosted preview auth|rate limits repeated failed login"
